.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(45, 39, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-container.background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(194, 133, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(78, 53, 4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(194, 133, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(51, 44, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--inline-title-font: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body.--OT-blockquote-font-family: Questa, "Stone Serif ITC Pro","Times Roman", serif
body.--OT-editMode-font: '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--OT-editMode-font-family:
'??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif,
    												"Comic Sans MS",
													ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.inline-title.font-family: "??", "??", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(245, 184, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(245, 184, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(54, 47, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(54, 47, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(194, 133, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(45, 39, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(250, 219, 158) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(32, 28, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(38, 33, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(38, 33, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(38, 33, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(38, 33, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(45, 39, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(38, 33, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(51, 44, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
